name: Voice AI Receptionist - FAQ Router
description: Classifies inbound caller questions against the FAQ knowledge base and returns the appropriate response or triggers escalation.

nodes.name: Receive Intent Input
nodes.description: Receives classified intent from the call handler workflow

nodes.name: OpenAI - FAQ Lookup
nodes.description: Matches caller question to FAQ knowledge base and returns approved answer

nodes.name: IF - Answer Found
nodes.description: Checks if a matching FAQ answer was found

nodes.name: Return FAQ Answer
nodes.description: Passes the matched answer back to the call handler for voice generation

nodes.name: Trigger Escalation
nodes.description: Flags the call for human follow-up and logs escalation reason

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Log Escalation
nodes.description: Records escalated calls with caller info and reason for follow-up

note: This workflow is called by the main call handler to classify and route FAQ responses. Configure OpenAI credentials before use.
